title: Exchange partition creates duplicate _tidb_rowid causing global index to skip rows in nonclustered PK tables
description:
## Bug Report

### 1. Minimal reproduce step 
```
drop table if exists t,tp;
create table t (a int, b int,dt date, primary key (a) nonclustered);
create table tp (a int, b int,dt date, primary key (a) nonclustered) 
PARTITION BY RANGE (a) (
    PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (5),
    PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (11),
    PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN (20));

insert into tp(a,b) values (2,2),(4,2),(6,2);
insert into t(a,b)  values (12,2),(14,2),(15,2),(16,2);

alter table tp exchange partition p2 with table t;
select *, _tidb_rowid from tp  order by a ;

create index ind_b on tp(b) global;
select * from tp where b=2;
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? 
```
mysql> select * from tp use index() where b=2;
+----+------+------+
| a  | b    | dt   |
+----+------+------+
| 12 |    2 | NULL |
| 14 |    2 | NULL |
| 15 |    2 | NULL |
| 16 |    2 | NULL |
|  6 |    2 | NULL |
|  2 |    2 | NULL |
|  4 |    2 | NULL |
+----+------+------+
7 rows in set (0.01 sec)
```

### 3. What did you see instead 
//The returned data is insufficient
+----+------+------+
| a  | b    | dt   |
+----+------+------+
| 12 |    2 | NULL |
| 14 |    2 | NULL |
| 15 |    2 | NULL |
| 16 |    2 | NULL |
+----+------+------+

### 4. What is your TiDB version? 
v8.5.4

This issue appears similar to but is NOT the same as https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/65067
bug_features_seed: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS t1, t2;
CREATE TABLE t1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT, value DECIMAL(10,2), dt DATE, PRIMARY KEY (id)) PARTITION BY RANGE (id) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN (10), PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN (20));
key_bug_features: Exchange partition creates duplicate _tidb_rowid in tables
